similar_features.summary: NIP-17 DM pipeline is complete: buildChatRumor, sealAndWrap, publishDirectMessage in directMessages.ts. ContactChat component in contacts/ContactChat.tsx renders any DM thread given peerPubkeyHex. Settings page (pages/settings.tsx) uses VStack/Box rows. Contacts page (pages/contacts.tsx) calls listContacts() and renders a filtered list. NotificationBell.tsx links DM notifications to /contacts?id=<hex>.

architecture.summary: Modular monolith with package-by-feature layout. Config modules in app/src/config/ (blossom.ts, profile.ts). Env var accessors in app/src/lib/publicEnv.ts (bare process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_X, no guard, required by Next.js static replacement). knownPeers.ts is localStorage-only, synchronous, pure. walledGarden.ts is pure — isAllowedDmSender takes groups + knownPeers as params. MarmotContext.tsx seeds knownPeers via rememberKnownPeers on boot and on every group change. contacts.ts listContacts() reads localStorage; filtering is applied at view level in contacts.tsx. npubToPubkeyHex() exists in nostrKeys.ts for decoding.

testing_and_conventions.summary: Playwright e2e in app/tests/e2e/. Two-context (Alice/Bob) patterns via bootUserOnGroups helpers. Tests use window.__nostlingPublishDm bridge for DM sends (publish-through-app rule). Vitest unit tests in app/tests/unit/. Make e2e-up starts relay. Node scripts/run-e2e.mjs <spec> runs single test. i18n in app/src/lib/i18n.ts exports a Copy type with en and de language objects.

adr_constraints.ADR-002: Proposed (implemented). whitelist = MLS group members ∪ ever-known peers. Maintainer seeding: call rememberKnownPeers(MAINTAINER_PUBKEYS_HEX) at startup to ensure maintainer keys are always in the ever-known set regardless of group membership.
